locations.name: 阿根廷
locations.summary: 阿根廷共和国（西班牙語：República Argentina），通称阿根廷（西班牙語：Argentina，發音：[aɾxenˈtina] ），是位于南美洲南部的主权国家。由23个省和布宜諾斯艾利斯自治市组成的联邦共和国，占有南錐體的大部…

locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

locations.name: 巴西

locations.name: 乌拉圭
locations.summary: 乌拉圭东岸共和国（西班牙語：República Oriental del Uruguay），通称乌拉圭（西班牙語：Uruguay），南美洲东南部国家，西邻阿根廷，东与北邻巴西，南濒拉普拉塔河，东南濒大西洋。乌拉圭人口342万，其中近180…

locations.name: 圭亚那
locations.summary: 蓋亞那合作共和国（英語：Co-operative Republic of Guyana），通称圭亚那（英語：Guyana），位於南美洲北部，是南美洲一个以英語為官方語言的国家，也是英联邦成员國。東鄰蘇利南，南臨巴西，西鄰委内瑞拉，北鄰大西…

locations.name: 蘇利南
locations.summary: 蘇利南共和國（荷蘭語：Republiek Suriname），通稱蘇利南（Suriname；/ˈsʊərɪnæm, -nɑːm/ SOOR-in-A(H)M），舊稱洵南、荷屬圭亞那，位於南美洲東北部，地理上亦屬加勒比地區與西印度群島範疇。…

locations.name: 哥伦比亚
locations.summary: 哥伦比亚共和国（西班牙語：República de Colombia），通稱哥倫比亞（西班牙語：Colombia），是一個位於南美洲西北部的国家，同時是拉丁美洲第四大國家，為南美洲國家聯盟的前成員國（2018年8月退出）。它的北部是加勒比…

locations.name: 厄瓜多尔
locations.summary: 厄瓜多尔共和国（西班牙語：República del Ecuador），通稱厄瓜多尔（Ecuador），是位於南美洲西北部的國家，北面與哥倫比亞相鄰，南接祕魯，西面為太平洋，另包括距離厄瓜多本土1,000公里的加拉巴哥群島。 厄瓜多於18…

locations.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
locations.summary: 康乃爾大學鳥類學實驗室位於纽约州伊萨卡，是康乃爾大學研究鳥類學和其他野生生物的成員支援單位。位在薩普薩克森林保護區（Sapsucker Woods Sanctuary）伊莫金約翰遜鳥類和生物多樣性研究院中心（Imogene Powers…

locations.name: American Ornithological Society
locations.summary: The American Ornithological Society (AOS) is an ornithological organization based in the United States.

relations.subject: Southern scrub flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, Peru, and Uruguay. Other sources also place it in Guyana, Suriname, as a non-breeding visitor to Colombia, and as a vagrant in Ecuador.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Southern scrub flycatcher
relations.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 23, 2024 The Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Birds of the World agrees with the IOC on the nominate's range and adds that brevirostris occurs as a non-breeding visitor to northern and eastern Peru and "central Amazonia". The map in "A Field Guide to the Birds of Brazil" generally matches these source's range in Brazil. The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society does not provide separate ranges for subspecies

relations.subject: Southern scrub flycatcher
relations.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved October 23, 2024 The Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Birds of the World agrees with the IOC on the nominate's range and adds that brevirostris occurs as a non-breeding visitor to northern and eastern Peru and "central Amazonia". The map in "A Field Guide to the Birds of Brazil" generally matches these source's range in Brazil. The South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society does not provide separate ranges for subspecies

relations.subject: Southern scrub flycatcher
relations.evidence: | title =A Field Checklist of the Birds of Guyana | publisher =Smithsonian Institution National Museum of Natural History | edition =2 | date =2007 | page =21 | language =English | url =https://naturalhistory.si.edu/sites/default/files/media/file/birdchecklist2ndedition_4.pdf }} Avibase includes the species as rare and accidental in Guyana and Suriname. The southern scrub flycatcher inhabits dry to arid scrublands and open deciduous woodlands
